flow.name: Submit UK Mobile-eSIM port request
flow.goal: Admin submits a UK Mobile-eSIM port request without opening a manual support ticket.
flow.success_exit: Request submitted with order ID and Port history tracking entry.

layout_patterns.intent: Single decision step with primary selector and secondary prerequisite guidance.
Input and parsed results visible together for batch correction.
Explain missing prerequisite, external exit, draft preservation, and return behavior.
Grouped review summary with risk warnings before final submit.
Show submitted state, next tracking action, and recovery entry points.

screens.title: Select verified business address

source_trace.claim: Select verified business address is a new step; no address uses prompt exit.

screens.user_intent: Choose an already verified business address for the selected country.
screens.page_purpose: Confirm required address prerequisite before collecting port-in details.

components.role: Let admin select a verified address.

interactions.failure_behavior: Stay on current screen and show inline selection validation.

source_trace.claim: Address selection continues to port-in number entry.

states.message: No verified business address is available for this country.

recovery.return_behavior: Resume saved draft from Port history after verification.

source_trace.claim: Missing address is an external prompt exit, not an in-flow creation screen.

validations.rule: A verified address must be selected.
validations.error: Select a verified address to continue.
validations.recovery: Select a row or use the external exit.

screens.prototype_instruction: Show a verified-address selector and a blocked empty state that offers external exit plus draft return behavior.
out_of_scope_notes: Do not build address creation or KYC flow.

screens.title: Enter port-in numbers

source_trace.claim: Port-in numbers are entered before pre-check.

screens.user_intent: Enter one or many UK Mobile-eSIM numbers to port.
screens.page_purpose: Capture bulk numbers and prepare them for per-item validation.

components.role: Capture many numbers while previewing parsed rows.

data.accepted_input: one number per line or pasted list

components.role: Show parsed numbers and per-item validation status.

interactions.condition: At least one parseable number exists
interactions.result: Run pre-check and navigate to pre-check result
interactions.failure_behavior: Stay on screen and mark invalid rows.

states.message: Some numbers need correction before pre-check.

validations.rule: Each row must be parseable and not duplicated.

screens.prototype_instruction: Show bulk input with parsed preview and row-level validation; do not collapse all errors into one alert.

screens.title: Number pre-check result

source_trace.claim: Zoom automatically detects donor carrier and validates eligibility before PAC collection.

screens.user_intent: Review which numbers passed pre-check and fix failed rows before continuing.
screens.page_purpose: Make automated carrier detection and eligibility validation transparent and recoverable.

components.role: Show per-number carrier, eligibility, and fix actions.

source_trace.claim: Zoom automatically detects donor carrier and validates business-mobile eligibility.

interactions.condition: All blocking pre-check issues are resolved
interactions.result: Navigate to review request in this shortened sample
interactions.failure_behavior: Stay on result screen and keep failed rows editable.

source_trace.claim: Failed numbers return to correction; passing numbers continue through collection and review.

states.message: Some numbers failed eligibility or duplicate checks.

source_trace.claim: Pre-check failures return to number entry/correction.

validations.rule: Blocking failed rows must be corrected or removed.
validations.error: Show issue next to affected number.

screens.prototype_instruction: Show loading, grouped pass/fail results, per-row issue text, and row-level recovery actions.

screens.title: Review port request

source_trace.claim: Review summarizes request and submission validations.

screens.user_intent: Confirm carrier groups, PAC coverage, subscriber mapping, and port date before submit.
screens.page_purpose: Reduce risk before high-impact carrier submission.

components.role: Show request grouped by carrier and validation status.

interactions.failure_behavior: Stay on review and show exact failed validation with edit destination.

states.message: Some PAC codes are close to expiry.

validations.error: Selected date may not meet cutoff.

screens.prototype_instruction: Show grouped carrier/request summary, high-risk warnings above submit, and edit links back to affected steps.

screens.title: Submit success

source_trace.claim: Submitted requests continue to Port history tracking.

screens.user_intent: See confirmation and know where to track progress.
screens.page_purpose: Confirm submission and expose the next tracking action.

components.role: Show submitted state and next tracking entry.

states.message: Carrier API is unavailable for one group; a fallback ticket was created.

recovery.action: Track fallback ticket in Port history

screens.prototype_instruction: Show order ID, confirmation email expectation, Port history action, and fallback ticket state if applicable.
out_of_scope_notes: Do not build full Port history dashboard.

needs_confirmation.reason: US/TMO detailed fields are open and not used in this UK flow.

out_of_scope_items.reason: D4 marks it as prerequisite only.

out_of_scope_items.item: Subscriber creation and temporary number acquisition
out_of_scope_items.reason: D3/D4 mark it as prerequisite only.
